completed_tasks.name: Iterative feedback round: hero copy, section reorder, featured systems, chat heading, contact modal, LinkedIn, calendar link
Tracking + chat QA automation
completed_tasks.progress: Vercel Analytics wired, attribution capture deployed, event tracking on key interactions, chat QA script written but chat API 500s on prod

remaining_tasks.name: Fix chat API 500 on Vercel production
Full copy edit review with expert perspectives

blockers.description: Chat API returns 500 on production. profile-loader.ts uses fs.readFileSync to read content/profile/*.md files from disk. Works locally but fails on Vercel serverless because content/ directory is not bundled into the serverless function.
blockers.workaround: Three options: (1) inline content as TS constants, (2) use dynamic import with webpack asset, (3) add content/ to next.config outputFileTracingIncludes. Option 3 is cleanest.

blockers.description: Hero copy reads too personal/egotistical. Ryan's feedback: the first-person war stories make it about him, not about the visitor's pain. Needs copy review session.
blockers.workaround: Plan /gsd:quick --discuss with brainstorming from resume experts, headhunters, speechwriters, positioning consultants

decisions.decision: Repositioned from investor-facing to client-facing targeting campaigns, advocacy, nonprofits
decisions.rationale: Bella's feedback identified unclear audience and too many products

decisions.decision: Featured systems: whatamivotingon.com (top, linked), Campaign Finance Dashboard, LifeVault, Relay (bottom)
decisions.rationale: Political ops relevance; aviation/dev tools removed entirely

decisions.decision: Modular chat profile system ported from Stripped with audience-specific emphasis overrides
decisions.rationale: Radical honesty personality, experience weighting, campaigns-advocacy audience profile

decisions.decision: /invest redirects to /work-with-me, nav says Work With Me
preview.quartermint.com as staging domain with manual Vercel alias workflow
decisions.rationale: Hobby plan can't change production branch; manual deploy/alias works for solo dev

decisions.decision: Vercel Analytics + Redis visitor tracking for attribution and event logging
decisions.rationale: Lightweight, no new dependencies, per-visitor journey in existing Upstash Redis

decisions.decision: amp-ops always anonymized as Campaign Finance Dashboard / a state PAC
Section order: Hero > Chat > Origin Story > Featured Systems > Contact
decisions.rationale: Ryan's feedback: chat is primary CTA, should be immediately visible

decisions.decision: Send message modal replaces bare email link
decisions.rationale: Ryan's feedback: don't want email just listed

next_action: Fix chat API 500: add outputFileTracingIncludes for content/ in next.config, then run scripts/chat-qa.ts to validate. Then start copy edit review session.
context_notes: Bella's feedback drove a major site repositioning in this session. Ryan gave real-time feedback as we iterated. The hero copy still needs work — Ryan flagged it as too egotistical/personal. The chat QA script is ready but blocked by the profile-loader filesystem issue on Vercel. Deploy workflow: npx vercel --prod --yes for prod, npx vercel --yes + npx vercel alias <url> preview.quartermint.com for preview.
